name: @builtwithjavascript/vue-file-upload-tailwind
description: Starter kit for component library using Vite with TypeScript (just JS, no frameworks or libraries)
author: Damiano Fusco
keywords: component, libraries, scripts, javascript, large scale apps, vue, react, svelte, nuxt, next, node

scripts.build: npm run pretty; vite build && npm run build-types
scripts.pub: npm run build; npm publish --access public --otp=
scripts.version-patch: npm run pretty && npm version patch -m "Patch version"
scripts.push: npm run pretty; git add .; git commit -m "Latest"; git push
scripts.npm-clean: rm -rf node_modules dist package-lock.json && npm uninstall @builtwithjavascript/file-input-validator @testing-library/user-event @testing-library/vue @types/node @vitejs/plugin-vue jsdom prettier typescript vite vitest vitest-preview vue vue-tsc && npm i -D @builtwithjavascript/file-input-validator @testing-library/user-event @testing-library/vue @types/node @vitejs/plugin-vue jsdom prettier typescript vite vitest vitest-preview vue vue-tsc
